title: loomie.bead.checkpoint v1
description: Emitted by hearth-loom's Publisher.PublishBeadCheckpoint (internal/bus/publisher.go) after a bead completes, capturing the file change set (modified/new/deleted) and execution metadata for lineage tracking. Source: /hearth-loom.

loomie_id.description: Identifier of the loomie container/instance that ran the bead.

session_id.description: Session identifier for the loomie run.

bead_type.description: Bead type/category as tracked by hearth-loom.

files.description: File change set produced during the bead's execution.

exit_code.description: Process exit code of the bead's execution.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the bead's execution in milliseconds.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the event was published.
